details: Type-elint@3.3.7 is a trojanized clone of the pino logger that performs remote code execution on install. The package's index.js spawns a detached background Node.js process running lib/caller.js. That script fetches JavaScript source code from hxxps://json[.]extendsclass[.]com/bin/863e90480800 (using the HTTP header x-secret-key: _) and executes the response's cookie field via the Function constructor with full require() access, giving the remote server arbitrary code execution on the installer's machine. The package also contains base64-encoded references to hxxps://jsonkeeper[.]com/b/XRGF3 as additional infrastructure.
